_note: Replaces fragile Indian Kanoon scraping with AWS Open Data SC + 25 HCs (CC-BY-4.0). Adds tribunals + India Code.

sources.name: Indian Supreme Court (AWS Open Data, CC-BY-4.0)
sources.access: Anonymous S3 (no auth) via aws s3 sync --no-sign-request

sources.name: Indian High Courts (AWS Open Data, 25 HCs, CC-BY-4.0)
sources.coverage: All 25 Indian High Courts; tens of millions of judgments. Sample by authority.

sources.name: Indian Tribunals consolidated (ITAT, CESTAT, NCLAT, NGT, CAT, TDSAT, SAT, IBBI, AFT, DRT, CCI)
sources.url: https://itat.gov.in/judicial/tribunalorders ; https://cestat.gov.in/ ; https://nclat.nic.in/judgement-data ; https://greentribunal.gov.in/judgments ; https://cgat.gov.in/ ; https://tdsat.gov.in/ ; https://sat.gov.in/ ; https://ibbi.gov.in/en/orders ; https://aftdelhi.nic.in/ ; https://drt.gov.in/ ; https://www.cci.gov.in/antitrust/orders
sources.coverage: Income Tax, Indirect Tax, Company/IBC, Environment, Service Law, Telecom, Securities, Insolvency, Defence, Banking, Competition.

sources.name: India Code (DSpace) — Central + State Acts
sources.coverage: All enforced central + state Acts, rules, notifications, ordinances.

sources.name: PRS Legislative Research (CC BY 4.0)
sources.coverage: Bills (central + state), Acts, policy briefs, budget analyses, committee reports.

sources.name: Indian Kanoon API (rate-limited, landmark cases)
sources.coverage: SC + 24 HC + tribunals; use for landmark cases the AWS bucket misses.
sources.license: Indian Kanoon API ToS (attribution mandatory; ~₹500 dev credit)

sources.name: TN OGD Portal (Tamil Nadu CKAN)
sources.coverage: Tamil Nadu open data — judicial statistics, legal-aid metrics, vernacular Tamil gazettes.
